title: stenostephanus magdalenensis
intro: Stenostephanus magdalenensis is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae, native to Colombia. The plant's medicinal properties have been reported to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits. It is said to aid in reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Stenostephanus magdalenensis is often prepared as a tea or decoction, and its leaves can be used fresh or dried for herbal remedies.
